description: Remote signature add-ons for C0defusi0n SecurityScanner. These patterns are MERGED ON TOP of the module's built-in baseline — put only NEW/extra detections here. Each 'regex' is a full PCRE pattern with delimiters and flags; invalid patterns are skipped by the module.

patterns.description: Base64-decoded payload piped into fetch() — common Magecart exfiltration shape
assert()-based PHP webshell using base64-encoded code
Checkout/login form posting to an external host (credential or card theft)
Detects common markers for the WSO (Web Shell by oRb) webshell, a popular PHP backdoor.
Detects common markers for the c99 webshell, a feature-rich PHP backdoor.
Detects the specific PHP probe left by attackers exploiting Amasty Order Attributes file upload vulnerability.
Detects a specific MD5 hash used in a PolyShell webshell variant for password protection.
Detects malicious JavaScript injection domain associated with PolyShell attacks.
Detects references to 'accesson.php' backdoor file dropped by PolyShell attackers within PHP code.
Detects 'worcksbot.com' C2 domain used in SessionReaper post-exploitation.
Detects 'sagecrafft.com' C2 domain used in SessionReaper post-exploitation.
